title: Automate Nucleo entropy reset regression
description: Follow-up from project-LICHEN-oqv7.8 reviews. Existing Renode integration tests exercise raw SubGHz MMIO but do not boot Nucleo firmware through STM32 entropy initialization or verify the reset macro clears a previously asserted RNG IRQ. Add automated coverage using a canonical firmware artifact/build path without hardcoded test results.
acceptance_criteria: Automated Renode coverage boots Nucleo firmware through entropy initialization and asserts no IRQ stall/storm; a reset-path check activates/asserts RNG IRQ, invokes canonical reset, and proves normal post-reset entropy progress; test remains offline and deterministic.
close_reason: Completed sales PRFAQ playbook, automated entropy reset test with 3 codereview passes, all lint/test/gates pass, decomposed epic
